## Summary
- What changed and why

## Linked issue
- Fixes #

## Validation
- [ ] Manual test performed
- [ ] Logs reviewed (`logs/services*.log`)
- [ ] Relevant docs updated

## Risk / rollback
- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback plan:

## Checklist
- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I read `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`
- [ ] Changes are focused and scoped
- [ ] No secrets/private data included
